patches.note: Move the initial dispatch target forward by the total 94-byte insertion in the PLAY path.

Map chooseKongP2.currentState to its Kong string, store it in mRuntimeData.Char_P2, then call the native UpdateCharacterTypes(P1, P2) callback before initLevelTransition. The callback name is assembled from existing constant-pool strings so no ABC pool entry is added.
Correct the PLAY case of the final lookupswitch after the total 94-byte insertion: offset changes from -178 to -272.
